All cues align with the baseline prediction; no contradictory evidence exists.",

Sky is partly cloudy; lighting suggests midday summer

Yellow fire hydrant — standard color in North America
Pickup truck parked facing forward (consistent with RHD countries)
White edge lines and double yellow center — standard US road marking
